/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/tc29_test.dir/l2/tc29_test.cpp.o  -o tc29_test  liblog_test_support.a ../log_l2/liblog_l2.a ../log_service/liblog_service.a ../log_writer/liblog_writer.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.5.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfmt.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so ../log_agent/liblog_agent.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so
